title: ChatKing
body:
# Welcome to ChatKing  
The main function of this mod is to add moderator commands, emojis, player pinging, and more!

## Emojis  
There is a list of Emojis for players to use, some of which are greyscale  
Because we also let players color text using "&&"!  (gamerule to disable)  
  
For all emojis use

```
/chat emojilist 
```

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
:sus: :cute: :mcreative: :skull: :up: :down: :oh_really: :hm:
:clown: :zzz: :heart: :sob: :lock:

</details>

## Moderation    
Finally we've added Moderation commands such as  
/chat inspect - this is a togglable command that lets you see who has interacted with any block entity

/chat status User|Moderator  
/chat punish mute PLAYER hours minutes reason    
/chat punish unmute PLAYER  
/chat punish warn PLAYER reason  
/chat query PLAYER Mutes|Warns  
/chat status PLAYER Promote|Demote  

## Logger  
Logs
- Chat
- Commands
- Block Entity Interactions
- Player Join
- Player Leave
